dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Daily targets and recent nutrition activity.

empty.line1: You have not set your age, weight, activity level, and macro rules yet.
empty.line2: Once saved, this page will show your daily targets and progress summaries.
empty.subtitle: Build your profile first to unlock calorie targets, macro planning, and trend tracking.

summary.oneEntry: One weigh-in saved. Add one more entry to see trend direction.

today.modeSentence: You are currently in {{mode}} mode with a target of {{calories}} kcal/day.

quickAdd.title: Quick Add (Food Estimate)
quickAdd.helper: Use comma-separated items. Format: quantity + unit + food (e.g. 150g chicken or 2 eggs). Local parser runs first, then external suggestions are shown when needed.

feedback.enterFood: Enter food items first. Example: 2 eggs, 80g oats, 150g chicken
feedback.parseFailed: Could not parse input. Try the example format below.
feedback.estimateReady: Estimate is ready. Review it, then add to today's log.
feedback.estimateWithWarnings: Estimate is ready with {{count}} warning(s). You can still add it to today.
feedback.noEstimateToAdd: Estimate first, then use Add to Today.
feedback.addedToToday: Estimated meal was added to today's log.
feedback.savedWithWarnings: Estimate saved with {{count}} warning(s). Review parsing details below.
feedback.savedSuccess: Estimate calculated and added to your daily log.
feedback.externalSuggestionsReady: {{count}} external suggestion(s) found. Select the correct food below.
feedback.apiFailed: External food lookup failed. You can retry or refine the input.
feedback.invalidSelectedAmount: Enter a valid gram amount for the selected food.
feedback.externalAdded: Selected external food was added to your daily log.

quickAdd.noEstimate: No estimate yet. Try: 2 eggs, 80g oats, 150g chicken

external.partialLocalMatch: Partial local match was logged. You can complete missing foods from suggestions below.
external.noResults: No external food results found for "{{query}}".
external.noResultsHint: Try a simpler food name, add quantity/unit (e.g. 100g), or use English/Turkish aliases.
external.apiFailure: Could not reach external food service right now.
external.selectPrompt: Select the closest food, preview macros, then add to daily log.
external.invalidAmount: Amount must be greater than 0 g.

dailyLog.title: Daily Log
dailyLog.emptyLine1: No items logged yet. Your estimates will appear here after Quick Add.
dailyLog.totalsLine: Today's totals: P {{protein}}g / F {{fat}}g / C {{carb}}g / {{calories}} kcal

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Set your baseline and macro rules.

age.label: Age
age.error: Enter a valid age between 13 and 90.

heightCm.label: Height (cm)
heightCm.error: Enter a valid height between 120 and 230 cm.

weightKg.label: Weight (kg)
weightKg.error: Enter a valid weight between 35 and 250 kg.

fatMinGPerKg.label: Fat min (g/kg)
fatMinGPerKg.error: Enter fat minimum between 0.3 and 1.5 g/kg.

errors.fixBeforeSave: Please fix highlighted fields before saving.

profile.saveSuccess: Profile saved. Dashboard targets are updated.

weightLog.title: Weight Log
weightLog.subtitle: Track daily scale changes and EMA trend.

fields.weightHint: Suggested daily weigh-in range: 20 to 350 kg.

feedback.invalid: Enter a valid date and weight between 20 and 350 kg.

weightLog.latestEmpty2: Add your first morning weigh-in to start the trend.
weightLog.trendEmptyNoEntries: No entries yet. Add your first data point to begin tracking.
weightLog.trendEmptyNeedMore: One entry saved. Add one more entry on a different day to see a meaningful trend.
weightLog.entriesEmpty: No weight entries yet. Saved entries will appear here.
